allow: Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "cd /home/pi/git/PiWeatherControl && git pull && sudo systemctl restart enclosure.service")
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 'ls /sys/class/thermal/ && echo '\\''---'\\'' && for d in /sys/class/thermal/cooling_device*/; do echo "$d: $\(cat ${d}type\)"; done')
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 'for d in /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon*/; do echo "$d: $\(cat ${d}name 2>/dev/null\)"; done')

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "cat /sys/devices/platform/cooling_fan/hwmon/hwmon3/pwm1 && echo '---' && cat /sys/devices/platform/cooling_fan/hwmon/hwmon3/pwm1_enable && echo '---' && cat /sys/devices/platform/cooling_fan/hwmon/hwmon3/name")
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "ls /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/ && echo '====' && cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/type && echo '====' && cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/temp")

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "for i in 0 1 2 3 4; do echo \\"trip_point_\\${i}: temp=\\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/trip_point_\\${i}_temp\) type=\\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/trip_point_\\${i}_type\) hyst=\\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/trip_point_\\${i}_hyst\)\\"; done")

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "for i in 0 1 2 3 4; do echo \\"cdev\\${i}: \\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/cdev\\${i} 2>/dev/null\) trip=\\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/cdev\\${i}_trip_point 2>/dev/null\) weight=\\$\(cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/cdev\\${i}_weight 2>/dev/null\)\\"; done")

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 'for p in fan_temp0 fan_temp0_speed fan_temp0_hyst fan_temp1 fan_temp1_speed fan_temp1_hyst fan_temp2 fan_temp2_speed fan_temp2_hyst fan_temp3 fan_temp3_speed fan_temp3_hyst; do echo "$p: $\(xxd -p /sys/firmware/devicetree/base/__overrides__/$p 2>/dev/null\)"; done')

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "xxd -p /sys/firmware/devicetree/base/cooling_fan/cooling-levels && echo '---' && xxd -p /sys/firmware/devicetree/base/cooling_fan/cooling-max-state && echo '---' && xxd -p /sys/firmware/devicetree/base/cooling_fan/cooling-min-state")

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "echo 'Current CPU temp:' && cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/temp && echo 'Fan RPM:' && cat /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon3/fan1_input && echo 'PWM value \(0-255\):' && cat /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon3/pwm1 && echo 'PWM enable:' && cat /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon3/pwm1_enable && echo 'Cooling device state \(0-4\):' && cat /sys/class/thermal/cooling_device0/cur_state")
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "cd /home/pi/git/PiWeatherControl && git pull && sudo systemctl restart piweathercontrol.service")
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "sudo systemctl status piweathercontrol.service | head -15")
Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "curl -s http://localhost:8085/api/status | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[\\"sensors\\"][\\"pi_fan\\"], indent=2\)\)'")

Bash(ssh pi@allskypi5 "ls -l /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/trip_point_{1,2,3,4}_temp && echo '---' && ls -l /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon3/pwm1 && echo '---' && cat /sys/class/thermal/cooling_device0/max_state && echo '---' && ls -l /sys/class/thermal/cooling_device0/cur_state")
